subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou through Whose Name the pen of the Most High hath traced its course in the kingdom of creation, and the cry hath been raised amidst [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من باسمک ارتفع صریر القلم الاعلی فی ملکوت الانشاء و ظهرت الصیحه بین
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
